title: Ek Hi Raasta
subTitle: Army officer Vikram works with terrorist Kubla and steals vital army information for him. In the process, he ends up killing a colleague and pins the blame on a fellow soldier.

title: Sau Din Saas Ke
subTitle: Durga marries Prakash, unaware of his mother Bhawani Devi's dominating and abusive nature. She later insists on moving in with his family in order to teach Bhawani Devi a lesson.

title: Kartoos
subTitle: ACP Jay Suryavanshi assigns an inmate on death row, Jeet, the task of killing Jagat, a terrorist. Things take a turn when Jeet falls in love with Mini and gets distracted from his mission.

title: Chandni
subTitle: Rohit sets out to find his former lover, whom he leaves due to his accident. When he meets her, he finds out she is engaged to marry her boss.

title: Humko Tumse Pyaar Hai
subTitle: A woman who is blind struggles to come to terms with the apparent death of her first love and a new love who wants to help her move on with her life.

title: Singham Returns
subTitle: Bajirao Singham, an honest police officer, encounters Babaji, a god-man with connections to high profile politicians, when he investigates the death of an officer from his team.

title: Kunwara
subTitle: Raju and Urmila fall deeply in love and vow to reunite in India. However, complications arise when Raju agrees to pose as Sharmila's husband before her family.

title: Ghulam-E-Musthafa
subTitle: A notorious hitman forsakes a life of crime after his lady love suffers a tragic death due to his professional rivalries. However, the mafia compels him to return for a final hit job.

title: Big Brother
subTitle: A meek man, Devdhar, gets infuriated after a politician's son throws acid on his sister. However, his life changes when he kills the culprit, whose family later seeks revenge from Devdhar.

title: Big Brother
subTitle: A meek man, Devdhar, gets infuriated after a politician's son throws acid on his sister. However, his life changes when he kills the culprit, whose family later seeks revenge from Devdhar.

title: Hera Pheri
subTitle: Two tenants and a landlord, in desperate need of money, chance upon a ransom call via a cross-connection. They hatch a plan to claim the ransom for themselves.

title: NISHANT - The Night's End
subTitle: After his wife Rukmini is abducted by his cruel brother, Vishwam is forced to confront the deep-rooted issues of power and control that plague their village, leading to tragic consequences.

title: Colors Cineplex Bollywood
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Maine Dil Tujko Diya
subTitle: Ajay and Ayesha fall in love with each other after becoming friends. However, the couple goes through several obstacles as they face the wrath of her father who disapproves of their relationship.

title: Soldier
subTitle: After Major Vijay Malhotra's colleagues betray him, he is branded as a traitor and subsequently killed. But his son, Vicky, vows to take revenge on his father's murderers and prove his innocence.

title: Raja Hindustani
subTitle: Raja, a taxi driver, falls in love with Aarti, a rich girl and marries her against her parents' wishes. Later, her stepmother tries to create differences between the couple.

title: Son of Sardaar
subTitle: Jaswinder returns to his hometown to sell a piece of land he owns and falls in love with a young woman only to find out later that her family wants him dead.

title: Border
subTitle: A small battalion of Indian soldiers go up against a 2000 well-armed Pakistani strike force. They must defend their post all night until they receive assistance from the Indian Air Force.

title: Mann
subTitle: Dev and Priya fall in love despite being engaged to their respective partners and decide to reunite after six months to get married. However, destiny has other plans for them.

title: Mann
subTitle: Dev and Priya fall in love despite being engaged to their respective partners and decide to reunite after six months to get married. However, destiny has other plans for them.

title: Naagin Bani Suhaagan
subTitle: Vaishali, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, is blessed with a boon to transform herself into a shapeshifting snake. She falls into a dilemma when circumstances force her to go against her love.

title: Vaada Raha...I Promise
subTitle: Duke Chawla leads a perfect life with a good job and a beautiful girlfriend. However, when he meets with an accident, his life changes forever.
